series_metadata.series_title: HT Series Physical Ability Test Administration Materials
series_metadata.series_description: These records document the official administration manuals, scripts, policies & procedures, candidate rating sheets for course set up & candidate notification for the HT series selection/hiring process. re: The Physical Ability Test (PAT)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain documents for at least one (1) year after administration date. After one (1) year of retention of hard copy transfer/scan documents into electronic format. Destroy paper document after electronic file(s) has been checked for quality & completeness. ; Electronic: Retain electronic documentation for six (6) years from the administration date then destroy/delete unless litigation is pending. Consult with Personnel or Chief Legal Counsel., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
